title: HiveTrace
description: HiveTrace AI monitors gen AI and agentic traffic in real time, inspecting prompts and responses to detect injection attempts, privacy leaks, and hidden system instructions, then issues immediate alerts and logs events for compliance audits.

items: Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails, Configure Inter-agent authorization policies, capabilities, & roles
Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Audit reflection accuracy by comparing stated & observed planning outcomes.
